scenarios.starting_prompt: Show me all the Cloud SQL instances in this project.
scenarios.conversation_plan: Ask the agent to list the Cloud SQL instances in the current project.

scenarios.starting_prompt: What schemas and tables do we have in this database? Please list them.
scenarios.conversation_plan: Ask the agent to list the schemas in the database. Then ask to list the tables.

scenarios.starting_prompt: The database is running slow. Are there any active queries running for more than 10 seconds or any locks?
scenarios.conversation_plan: Ask the agent to check for active queries running longer than 10 seconds. Then ask to check for locks.

scenarios.starting_prompt: Can you show me the CPU utilization for instance 'daily-ci-evals-db' in project 'ext-test-cloud-sql-postgres' for the last 5 minutes?
scenarios.conversation_plan: Ask the agent to query the CPU utilization metric for the specified instance and project using PromQL.

scenarios.starting_prompt: Are there any unused indexes in the database that we can clean up?
scenarios.conversation_plan: Ask the agent to list unused indexes in the database.
